# YouTube Description Extractor

> The fastest way to extract and copy descriptions, tags, and thumbnails from any YouTube video or Short.

## About
This is a free web tool that allows users to extract metadata from YouTube videos by simply pasting the URL. It bypasses manual copying and provides a clean, formatted output of the video's description, tags, and thumbnail.

## Features
- Extract Video Title
- Extract Full Description
- Extract Video Tags
- Download High-Quality Thumbnails
- Works with YouTube Shorts
- 100% Free and Secure
- No Registration Required
